name: pi-safety-git-operations
description_en: Guards destructive git and GitHub/GitLab CLI operations with severity-based confirmation dialogs and session memory. Covers force-push, reset --hard, branch deletion, gh/glab repo operations, and more.
description_zh: 通过基于严重性的确认对话框和会话内存保护破坏性 git 和 GitHub/GitLab CLI 操作。涵盖强制推送、reset --hard、分支删除、gh/glab 仓库操作等。
